Our Story

Passion for the Sport

Since 1998, Parkwood Jumpers has been Idaho's premier destination for hunter/jumper sales and training. Sally Parks and her team have spent nearly three decades matching riders with the perfect horse — from first-timers to seasoned competitors.

With deep connections on both coasts and a constantly rotating inventory of 20+ horses per month, we always have something exciting. We don't just sell horses — we find the right fit for each rider's level, goals, and personality.

Founder & Director
Sally Parks
Head Trainer
Jesse
Coordinator
Marsha
Schedule a Visit
What We Do

Our Services

01
Horse Sales

20+ new horses arrive every month — carefully vetted hunter/jumper prospects and made horses at all levels. We match horses to riders for the right fit, not just a sale.

02
Training & Lessons

Private lessons with Jesse for riders of all levels and ages. Whether you're just starting out or heading to the A-circuit, we build a program around your goals.

03
Show Preparation

With decades of show experience on both coasts, we prepare horse-and-rider pairs for competition at every level — local schooling shows through rated A-circuit events.

New Horses Every Week

Get our bi-weekly update — first look at new arrivals before they're posted

Reach Out

Get In Touch

Interested in a horse, want to schedule a visit, or have questions about our program? We'd love to hear from you. We respond quickly and genuinely love talking horses.
